## Type

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch named `feat/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, or `chore/`
- [ ] Conventional commit messages
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] No new network calls in the offline core (or opt-in and documented)
- [ ] Docs or roadmap updated if behavior changed
